trading.ai_trader_disclaimer: Simulation only. No live broker execution. Not financial advice. Every paper-trade request forces dry-run execution.
trading.ai_trader_bottom_disclaimer: Live trading button intentionally does not exist. Guardian risk checks, signal validation, RBAC, audit/event logging, and dry-run mode remain mandatory.
